hero.name: Rafael Garcez
hero.title: Cloud, Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Professional
hero.description: I am building my path at the intersection of cloud, security and infrastructure, grounded in technical fundamentals, disciplined learning and real respect for operations.
hero.panelLine1: Centered on secure, scalable and well-operated environments.

hero.panelLine3: Built to show consistency, not just intention.
hero.rail4: FAST TO REVIEW FOR HIRING TEAMS

projects.title: Projects where idea, architecture and execution meet
projects.description: Each product below reflects a build decision: solving a real problem with structure, clarity and attention to the operating experience.

items.name: TranspSaude
items.description: PWA supporting healthcare transport operations with request flow, review, operational distribution and public consultation. Structured with Cloudflare Pages, Functions and D1.

items.name: TEKA
items.description: Marketplace connecting readers and used bookstores with catalog, inventory, user roles, ISBN scanner, OCR, PWA support and architecture designed for growth with UX and compliance in mind.

items.name: Konnektx
items.description: PWA for barbershops, salons and beauty professionals with public page, scheduling, loyalty features and a base prepared to evolve with Cloudflare Worker.
